name: CompilerKV: Risk-Adaptive KV Compression via Offline Experience Compilation

description: arXiv:2602.08686v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Prefill-only KV compression freezes a token subset at the end of prefill and decodes from it without further eviction. The retention decision is therefore irreversible, yet existing methods estimate the corrective signals it relies on, per-head reliability and prompt-level compression sensitivity, online from a single noisy prompt. We ar...
author: Ning Yang, Chengzhi Wang, Yibo Liu, Baoliang Tian, Haijun Zhang
